metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi{\b MIDI Sequencer SuperGnome}\line\line Generative euclidean drum + synth sequencer for REAPER (JSFX).\line\line Up to 8 drum lanes (sample playback or MIDI out), plus bass, melody and chord synth sections with a master key, scales (including Pelog, Slendro and quarter-tone Rast), harmonic progressions, swing, nudge, per-lane filters and LFOs. Everything phase-locked to project beat 0.\line\line Installs a small DR-55 starter sample pack (kick, snare, rim) into Data/supergnome - lanes 1-3 load them by default. Drop your own WAVs into Data/supergnome to extend the palette.\line\line Insert it on a track as "JS: MIDI Sequencer SuperGnome" and press play.}

version.author: joade comack
version.changelog: First packaged release. - MIDI Sequencer SuperGnome JSFX (drum lanes + bass/melody/chords, master key, stems on 24 channels) - DR-55 starter samples (bd, sn, rim) installed to Data/supergnome, loaded on lanes 1-3 by default

metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi{\b under}\line\line The quiet room beneath mima.chat. REAPER tools by joade comack.\line\line Currently housing: MIDI Sequencer SuperGnome.}
